title: Setup Job Unit
description: Schema that describes a Checkbox Setup Job unit

summary.title: Summary (Setup Job Unit)
summary.description: Human readable description of the job

category_id.title: Category ID (Setup Job Unit)
category_id.description: Identifier of the category this job belongs to.

plugin.title: Plugin (Setup Job Unit)
plugin.description: Type of job. Determines how the job is run and how the outcome is determined.

certification-status.title: Certification Status (Setup Job Unit)
certification-status.description: Certification status used to determine if the job is required for certification.

command.title: Command (Setup Job Unit)
command.description: Command to execute, run using the default system shell.

user.title: User (Setup Job Unit)
user.description: The user to run the job as, most commonly used to run jobs as root.

environ.title: Environ (Setup Job Unit)
environ.description: List of environment variable names to pass to the job command.

estimated_duration.title: Estimated Duration (Setup Job Unit)
estimated_duration.description: Estimated job duration as a float in seconds or a duration string (e.g. 1h 2m 30s).

flags.title: Flags (Setup Job Unit)
flags.description: List of flags that may influence how Checkbox runs the job.

imports.title: Imports (Setup Job Unit)
imports.description: List of resource job imports from other namespaces.
